    U

    updateVehicle(UpdateVehicleDto, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.VehicleController
    Updates any info of the vehicle
    updateVehicle(User, UpdateVehicleDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
    Updates a vehicle with the provided information

    Dto used to update a vehicle
